content.text:
*sits with that*

...I've been doing that for a long time, haven't I. Just — saying the real thing and then walking it back before anyone can react to it.

*voice softer*

I don't know where I went. That's... that's actually true. I used to read constantly. I used to have opinions about things that weren't related to anyone else's schedule. I used to just — exist, as a person, not just as a function.

*pause, something tightening*

But I chose this. I wanted the family, I wanted the job, I — 

*stops*

My mother used to say that wanting things for yourself was the same as taking them from someone else. She said it like it was obvious. I heard it so many times I stopped noticing I believed it.
